subtasks.description: Query license data grouped by publisher, computing total contract value, average cost per seat, and license count for each publisher

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single aggregation query with straightforward GROUP BY logic. No multi-source reconciliation or complex joins are indicated. The task requires one SQL query with basic aggregate functions (SUM, AVG, COUNT), which a small-tier model can reliably generate. No dependencies between subtasks since only one data retrieval operation is needed.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) as total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) as average_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) as license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
